output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?decade(COUNT(?player) AS ?total)(SUM(IF(?position = wd:Q182557 , 1 , 0)) AS ?centers)((SUM(IF(?position = wd:Q182557 , 1 , 0)) * 100.0 / COUNT(?player)) AS ?percent) WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P4127 ?year .
  ?player wdt:P2003 ?position .
  BIND(CONCAT(SUBSTR(STR(?year) , 1 , 3) , '0') AS ?decade)
}
GROUP BY ?decade
